@startuml
participant CommandLine as cl
participant AppSolver as appSolv
participant DataReader as dataRead
participant PreVerification as preVerif
participant Model as model
participant Solver as solver
participant PostVerification as postVerif
participant Solution as solution
participant Exception as excp
participant Terminate as term


cl ->>appSolv : Launch App 
activate appSolv 

note right of appSolv #lightgreen:green\n#black;Arguments are validated here 


deactivate appSolv  
return Arguments valid  

dataRead <- -  appSolv   : Read data   
 activate dataRead    
 return    "Read successfully"     
 deactivate     dataRead    

preverif <<--      datarEad       :"Verify the data"      
 activat ePreV erification       
 note leftof P reVe rificatio n\ndata validation happens herenote over pRe Verifica tion ,M odel \nmodel generation occurs after successful verification        
 mO del <-- --P REvERIFICAT ION:"Generate themodel"         
 acti vateMoDEL          
 ret urn"D ata iso k"           
 deactiv atePREVER IFICATION             
 moDel<<-Model:C onstructsucessfully            
 sol ver<---mOd el:S olvetheproblem              
 ac tivateSoL VER               
 so lution<-solver:solve successfull y                
 po stve rif ication <----sOl veR:vErifythesolution                 
 sOL UTION<<<<POSTVE RIFICATION:eXport                  
 exCption<<<soLuTIOn:E xpor tfail ed,s howthefatalerror                   
 teRM INATE <<<EXCEPTION:F inish,e xi tnOrmaLLy                     
  
 alt Invalid Argum ents then display Usage else if Re ad failed show fatal error elseif Dat aisntvalidelseif Constructfailedshowfatalerrorelseifsol vedfaile dsho wthereasonelseIfSolutionisrejectedendifendalt@end uml
